uiBuilder.label: D3 Column Chart
uiBuilder.description: A configurable, multi-series column (bar) chart rendered with D3.js. Restyle it entirely from the property panel and hook into click/hover events.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the chart. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the chart title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the chart title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Chart background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.

properties.name: series
properties.label: Data · Series data
properties.description: Array of series, each: { name, color, data: [ { label, value } ] }. Categories come from the first series' labels. Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.

properties.name: groupMode
properties.label: Data · Column grouping
properties.description: How multiple series are laid out.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Height of the chart in pixels.

properties.name: columnPadding
properties.label: Display · Column padding
properties.description: Gap between columns/groups as a fraction of band width (0 = touching, 0.9 = thin). Range 0-0.95.

properties.name: groupPadding
properties.label: Display · Inner group padding (grouped only)
properties.description: For grouped mode: gap between bars within a group, as a fraction (0-0.5).

properties.name: cornerRadius
properties.label: Display · Corner radius (2D only)
properties.description: Rounded top corners of each column, in pixels. Applies in flat (2D) mode only.

properties.name: bar3D
properties.label: Display · 3D columns
properties.description: Render columns as extruded 3D bars (with lit top and shaded side faces).

properties.name: depth3D
properties.label: Display · 3D depth (when 3D on)
properties.description: Extrusion depth of the 3D effect, in pixels.

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Animate columns growing in on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the grow-in animation in milliseconds.

properties.name: dropShadow
properties.label: Display · Drop shadow
properties.description: Apply a soft drop shadow to the columns.

properties.name: shadowColor
properties.label: Display · Shadow color (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Color of the column drop shadow (supports rgba).

properties.name: shadowBlur
properties.label: Display · Shadow blur (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Blur radius of the drop shadow, in pixels.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Display · Hover highlight
properties.description: Highlight a column on mouse-over.

properties.name: hoverColor
properties.label: Display · Hover color (when hover highlight on)
properties.description: Color a column turns on hover. Blank = automatically brighten the column's own color.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Base font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for chart text that doesn't have its own family set. Blank = inherit from the page.

properties.name: yAxisLabel
properties.label: Y-axis · Title
properties.description: Rotated caption beside the y-axis. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: yMin
properties.label: Y-axis · Minimum
properties.description: Fixed y-axis minimum. Leave blank for automatic.

properties.name: yMax
properties.label: Y-axis · Maximum
properties.description: Fixed y-axis maximum. Leave blank for automatic. Bars exceeding it are truncated at the top.

properties.name: yTickCount
properties.label: Y-axis · Tick count
properties.description: Approximate number of ticks/gridlines on the y-axis.

properties.name: yAxisFormat
properties.label: Y-axis · Label format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for the y-axis tick labels only (e.g. ".0f", "$,.0f", ".0%"). Blank = default.

properties.name: showGridlines
properties.label: Y-axis · Show gridlines
properties.description: Draw horizontal gridlines at each y tick.

properties.name: gridColor
properties.label: Y-axis · Gridline color
properties.description: Color of horizontal gridlines.

properties.name: xAxisLabel
properties.label: X-axis · Title
properties.description: Caption beneath the x-axis. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: axisColor
properties.label: Axes · Line color
properties.description: Color of the x and y axis lines and tick marks.

properties.name: axisTextColor
properties.label: Axes · Text color
properties.description: Text color for the x/y axis tick values and the axis titles.

properties.name: axisFontSize
properties.label: Axes · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the x/y axis tick values and the axis titles.

properties.name: axisFontFamily
properties.label: Axes · Font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for the x/y axis tick values and axis titles. Blank = use the base font family.

properties.name: showLegend
properties.label: Legend · Show legend
properties.description: Show a legend of series names with color swatches.

properties.name: legendPosition
properties.label: Legend · Position
properties.description: Where to place the legend.

properties.name: legendFontSize
properties.label: Legend · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the legend text.

properties.name: showValueLabels
properties.label: Data label · Show data labels
properties.description: Draw the numeric value inside each column.

properties.name: valueLabelFormat
properties.label: Data label · Label format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for the column value labels only (e.g. ".0f", ",.1f", "$,.0f", ".2%"). Blank = default.

properties.name: labelFontSize
properties.label: Data label · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the value labels drawn inside the columns.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a hover tooltip when the pointer is over a column.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Template
properties.description: Tooltip content (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {label}, {value}, {formattedValue}, {seriesName}, {seriesIndex}, {categoryIndex}, {percent} (of category total), {swatch} (a colored dot matching the series), {color} (the series color string), and any custom key on the data point (e.g. {owner}). Interpolated values are HTML-escaped; {swatch} renders a colored dot.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the pointer. Turn off to anchor it above the hovered column.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background color
properties.description: Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

properties.name: useSeriesColors
properties.label: Colors · Use per-series colors
properties.description: Use each series' own 'color' field when present. Falls back to the palette otherwise.

properties.name: colorPalette
properties.label: Colors · Color palette
properties.description: JSON array of CSS colors used per series when 'Use per-series colors' is off, e.g. ["#2E93fA","#66DA26"].

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks anywhere on the chart (not on a specific column).

payload.name: seriesCount
payload.label: Number of series
payload.description: How many series are currently rendered.

payload.name: categoryCount
payload.label: Number of categories
payload.description: How many categories (x-axis groups) are rendered.

actions.name: COLUMN_CLICKED
actions.label: Column clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks an individual column. Use to drill into details for that data point.

payload.name: seriesName
payload.label: Series name
payload.description: Name of the series the column belongs to.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Category label
payload.description: The category (x-axis) label of the column.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: The numeric value of the column.

actions.name: COLUMN_HOVERED
actions.label: Column hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a column. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.

payload.name: seriesName
payload.label: Series name
payload.description: Name of the series the column belongs to.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Category label
payload.description: The category (x-axis) label of the column.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: The numeric value of the column.
